current.summary: Hook/MCP naming feature COMPLETE. MCP scanner fix shipped (provider grouping dirs). Clickable sort headers added. Input field styling updated to background tint. Next: Phase 4 (metadata bar), hook script bundling, doc updates.

activeWork.description: TUI v3 — naming feature done, moving to Phase 4 (metadata bar) and hook script bundling
activeWork.progress: Phases 1-3 complete. Naming feature complete (modal, rename, --name flag, search fix). MCP scanner fixed for provider grouping dirs. Clickable column headers added.

git.lastCommit: 198bb84 chore: regenerate commands.json for --name flag on add

recentDecisions: Text input modal: lipgloss.Place centering (not custom overlay), background-tinted fields (not underlines/borders)
Input field styling: dim cyan BG when active (#1A3836 dark), dim grey BG when inactive (#282726 dark)
Modal buttons: all use background+padding (no borders) for consistent height
Search includes DisplayName — renamed items are searchable
Rename saves in-place (update catalog item DisplayName, no full re-scan)
MCP scanner: detect provider grouping dirs (no config.json + has subdirs with config.json) and recurse
Column headers clickable: click sorts by column, click again reverses direction
Hook script bundling design: flat layout (scripts alongside hook.json), detect both absolute+relative paths, rewrite paths at install time, config option for global vs project script location
nextSteps: 1. HOOK SCRIPT BUNDLING: During `syllago add hooks`, detect script refs in command fields, copy scripts into hook dir, store original path in metadata. At install time, copy scripts and rewrite paths.
2. PHASE 4 — METADATA BAR: Item detail panel below table/explorer showing DisplayName, type, source, description, installed providers, file count, path.
3. PHASE 5 — FILE TREE SPLIT: Content > Skills/Hooks tabs get file tree + preview split (like Library detail mode).
4. REGISTRY VALIDATION: Warn on unnamed hooks/MCP during `syllago validate` or registry sync.
5. DOC UPDATES: Update tui-adaptive-zones.md (Library section still describes gallery grid). Update cli/internal/tui/CLAUDE.md with new components (modal, table sort, input field styles).

context.notes: All tests passing (22 packages). Binary rebuilt. The naming feature added: modal.go (text input modal), [r] rename hotkey, --name flag on add, search includes DisplayName, clickable column headers, input field background tint styling. MCP scanner now handles mcp/<provider>/<server-name>/ layout correctly. Hook script bundling is next major feature — design decisions captured in memory and handoff.
context.tuiFiles: app.go, explorer.go, library.go, table.go, filetree.go, items.go, preview.go, topbar.go, helpbar.go, styles.go, keys.go, modal.go

previousSessions.summary: TUI v3 Phase 3 complete. Naming feature started — scanner DisplayName heuristics and CLI rename command shipped.
Brief session — paused to clarify file tree expansion UI. Resolved: file tree supports expand/collapse.
